title: Goal-Oriented Progress System with Therapy Milestones, Wellness Streaks, and Trophy Badges

requirements.text: Extend the backend to store and manage user goals, including therapy milestone goals (e.g., 'Complete 1st session with Serenity', 'Finish 3 CBT exercises', 'Attend a group class') and personal wellness streak targets (e.g., 'Log mood 7 days in a row', 'Use breathing tool 5 times', 'Journal for 3 consecutive days'). Each goal should track: id, title, description, goal type (milestone or streak), target value, current progress, completion status, and completion timestamp.

quotes: The goals should be therapy milestones like suggested. as well as hitting personal wellness targets setting streaks.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores goal definitions with type (milestone/streak), target, and progress fields
Goals can be queried per user
Goal progress can be updated and completion status is computed automatically when target is reached
Both therapy milestone goals and wellness streak goals are supported

requirements.text: Extend the backend to store and manage trophies/badges. Each trophy should be associated with a specific goal (awarded upon goal completion) and include: id, title, description, badge image identifier, date earned, and an optional session discount code or discount percentage it unlocks. When a goal is completed, automatically award the corresponding trophy to the user and generate a discount code if applicable.

quotes: Trophies should be visual badges as well as unlock discounts on sessions.

acceptanceCriteria: Trophies are stored per user with earned timestamps
Each trophy has a badge image identifier and optional discount value
Completing a qualifying goal automatically awards the trophy
Discount codes or discount percentages stored with trophy are retrievable by the user
User can query all earned trophies

requirements.text: Create a Goals & Progress page accessible from the main app navigation. Display two sections: 'Therapy Milestones' and 'Wellness Streaks'. Each goal card should show the goal title, description, a progress bar (current vs. target), and a locked/unlocked state. Completed goals should display a 'Completed' badge and the date achieved.

quotes: The goals should be therapy milestones like suggested. as well as hitting personal wellness targets setting streaks.

acceptanceCriteria: Page has two clearly labeled sections: Therapy Milestones and Wellness Streaks
Each goal card displays title, description, and a visual progress bar
Completed goals show a completion badge and timestamp
In-progress goals show current progress toward target
Page is accessible from main app navigation

requirements.text: Create a Trophies page (or tab within the Goals & Progress page) that displays all earned and locked trophy badges. Each earned trophy should render as a full-color visual badge image with its title and earn date. Locked trophies should be displayed as greyed-out/silhouette badges with a hint of the goal needed to unlock them. For trophies that unlock a session discount, display the discount amount and a copyable discount code prominently on the earned badge card.

quotes: Trophies should be visual badges as well as unlock discounts on sessions.

acceptanceCriteria: All trophy badges are displayed in a grid/gallery layout
Earned badges are full-color with title and date earned
Locked badges are visually muted/greyscale with unlock hint text
Trophies that carry a discount show the discount percentage and a copyable code
Page or tab is accessible from within the Goals & Progress area

requirements.text: Integrate goal progress tracking with existing user actions in the app: mood log submissions should increment streak-based wellness goals; journal entry submissions should increment journaling streak goals; session completions with Serenity should advance therapy milestone goals; group class attendance should advance group session milestone goals; and breathing/grounding/reframing tool usage should increment corresponding wellness tool goals.

quotes: hitting personal wellness targets setting streaks

acceptanceCriteria: Logging a mood entry increments the mood streak goal counter
Submitting a journal entry increments journaling streak goal counter
Completing a therapy session with Serenity advances the relevant milestone goal
Using a wellness tool (breathing, grounding, reframing) increments its corresponding goal
After any increment, if the goal target is met, the trophy is automatically awarded

requirements.text: Add a trophy badge notification or toast that appears when a user earns a new trophy. The notification should show the badge image, trophy name, and a congratulatory message. If the trophy includes a session discount, also display the discount amount in the notification.
acceptanceCriteria: A toast or modal notification appears immediately when a trophy is earned
Notification shows the badge visual, trophy title, and congratulatory message
If the trophy unlocks a discount, the discount is mentioned in the notification
Notification is dismissible

constraints: All backend logic must remain in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Discount codes are stored and displayed in-app only; no external email or SMS delivery
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket-based notifications for trophy events
External payment processing for discount redemption
Social sharing of trophies or badges
Admin panel for creating or editing goal/trophy definitions (definitions are hardcoded)

required: Glowing gold trophy cup badge illustration for 'First Session' milestone award (trophy-badge-first-session.dim_256x256.png)
Teal flame streak badge illustration for 'Mood Streak' wellness achievement (trophy-badge-mood-streak.dim_256x256.png)
Purple star badge illustration for 'Journaling Streak' wellness achievement (trophy-badge-journal-streak.dim_256x256.png)
Green lotus flower badge illustration for 'Wellness Tools' milestone achievement (trophy-badge-wellness-tools.dim_256x256.png)
Rose gold ribbon badge illustration for 'Group Session Attendee' milestone achievement (trophy-badge-group-session.dim_256x256.png)
Silver crescent moon badge illustration for 'Breathing Streak' wellness achievement (trophy-badge-breathing-streak.dim_256x256.png)
